description_long: This is a tall, slim aluminum can with a blue background and vibrant, playful graphics. The can features a large, stylized red character with a white visor, reminiscent of the popular 'Among Us' game, prominently displayed on the front. The label includes bold, colorful text such as 'AMONG' and 'TUTTI FRUTTI,' along with various icons and information about the drink's contents, including 'ZERO KOFFEIN' and 'ZERO TAURIN.' Nutritional and ingredient information is printed in small white text on the back. The can is topped with a standard silver pull-tab lid. The overall design is eye-catching, with a mix of red, blue, white, and orange colors and a glossy metallic finish.
description: A tall, slim blue aluminum can with playful red and white graphics, featuring a character and bold text, topped with a silver pull-tab lid.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large red character with a white visor and the bold 'AMONG' text, set against a blue background with white dots.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side nutritional and ingredient information, as well as the 'ZERO KOFFEIN' and 'ZERO TAURIN' text.
description_view_2: The can's side displays more of the red character and the repeated 'ZERO KOFFEIN' and 'ZERO TAURIN' text along the edge.
description_view_3: This angle focuses on the upper part of the can, showing the 'AMONG' text, flavor icons, and the top of the red character.
attribute_brand_logo: The can features a stylized 'AMONG' logo in bold orange and white letters on the front, accompanied by a red character with a white visor, both located centrally on the blue background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'TUTTI FRUTTI' is visible at the top, indicating a tutti frutti flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional and ingredient information is visible on the back of the can in small white text, including icons for vitamins and the volume (250 ml).
attribute_promotional_graphics: The can features a large red character with a white visor, reminiscent of a mascot, prominently displayed on the front.
